title: An Epicgod is Born
overview: Shigeru Yoshioka is a very ugly man who tries to reincarnate in another world, disgusted with life.

title: Exploring Epic Dungeon
overview: Shigeru and his group spend their first day in the city and set out to explore their first dungeon.

title: Hero's Epic Burning
overview: After his transformation, Seiji is determined to take down Kyoshiro's band of bandits.

title: One-Arm Epic Danger
overview: Shigeru's group heads to Valleria, but they decide to camp halfway to rest.

title: Epic Angel Descends
overview: Shigeru and Reeze stop Reia from hurting Seika. Then, Seika transforms into an angel to help Reia.

title: Epic Undercover Mission
overview: In Valleria, the party goes to a casino. Then, the hall master Kajita invites Seika to join the Extra Stage.

title: Villainous Epic Master
overview: Shigeru and Seika reach the Extra Stage of the casino to uncover Kajita’s “Liberation plan.”

title: Epic Colosseum Showdown
overview: Shigeru and the team barge into the battlefield, where they find out Kajita’s terrifying power.

title: Starting an Epic Company
overview: Shigeru’s mind is on Karina and Ordnung Spear. Then, a man who looks like Shigeru’s former boss appears.

title: Bewitching Epic Lady
overview: Leah, a mysterious applicant to Vis Bridge, seems to be connected to Shigeru’s past as well as Ordnung Spear.

title: Epic God in Despair
overview: Karina puts her plan into action.

title: Uglymug, Epicfighter
overview: Seika helps Shigeru remember who he is in this world, and he goes one-on-one against Karina.
